---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents:
    - list
    - projects.yml
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date]
  image-height: 200px
  grid-columns: 2
---

Welcome to my project portfolio. Each project below includes **executable Python code**, real datasets, and interactive visualisations.

::: {.callout-note}
All code in these projects runs live — no screenshots or static displays.
:::
